testsuite.name: SauceLabs.AddtoCartTest

testcase.name: afterClass

error.message: Session ID is null. Using WebDriver after calling quit()? Build info: version: '4.38.0', revision: '6b412e825c*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.1' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [null, findElement {using=id, value=react-burger-menu-btn}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 145.0.7632.160, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 145.0.7632.117 (de4e5d6e13b..., userDataDir: C:\Users\kickb\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:54170}, goog:processID: 14928, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:54170/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 145.0.7632.160, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true}
